subject: EVS
title: Here are some pictures of families. These are the families of

sections.heading: Here are some pictures of families. These are the families of
sections.content:
Here are some pictures of families. These are the families of
Nimmi, Tsering and Nazli. Let us look at these pictures, talk
about what we see and discuss.
A New Arrival!A New Arrival!A New Arrival!A New Arrival!A New Arrival!
There is great excitement in NimmiвҖҷs family. She has a new
baby sister.
2024-25
Changing Families
Look at the pictures and write
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– Who were the members of NimmiвҖҷs family before the
arrival of her baby sister ?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– How many members are there in NimmiвҖҷs family now?
Let us talk
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– How do you think the lives of NimmiвҖҷs family members have
changed after the arrival of the new baby ? For example вҖ“
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– How will Nimmi spend her day now ?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– What new work will her mother do now ?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– There will be a change in the daily work of NimmiвҖҷs father,
grandmother and uncle with the arrival of the new baby.
Can you tell how ?
For the teacher: Give an opportunity to each child to share his or her
experiences.
2024-25
Looking Around
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– Has a small brother or sister been born in your home or in
any house in your neighbourhood?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– How does it feel to have a new baby at home?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– How have things changed at home with the new baby ?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– Find out all about the youngest child in your home or in the
home of a relative. Then write вҖ“
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– When was the baby born?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– Is the baby a boy or a girl?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– How are you related to him or her?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– Where was the baby born?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– Who does the baby look like?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– What is the colour of his or her hair ?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– What is the colour of his or her eyes?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– Does the baby have any teeth?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– What do we feed the baby with?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– What is the babyвҖҷs length?
For the teacher: Encourage children to read their birth certificates and
health cards.
2024-25
Changing Families
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– How many hours a day does the baby sleep?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– What different sounds does the baby make?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– Who does the baby stay with most of the time?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– Stick a photograph of the baby or draw a picture in your
notebook.
New PlaceNew PlaceNew PlaceNew PlaceNew Place
TseringвҖҷs father received a letter from his office. The letter
said that he was being promoted and would have to move to
another city.
When TseringвҖҷs father showed the letter to his family, how
do you think the different members would have felt?
2024-25
Looking Around
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– What will change in TseringвҖҷs family after his fatherвҖҷs transfer ?
For example вҖ“
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– Who from TseringвҖҷs family will live with his father at the
new place? Which school will Tsering go to now ? Will he
have new friends?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– Has anybody in your family moved to a new place because
of work ?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– What do you feel about this change?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– Is there anyone in your class or school who has come to
your school from another place? If so, talk to him or her.
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– Where has she or he come from?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– What was his or her old school like?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– What does he or she find different here?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– Does he or she like the change?
2024-25
Changing Families
ItвҖҷs a Wedding!ItвҖҷs a Wedding!ItвҖҷs a Wedding!ItвҖҷs a Wedding!ItвҖҷs a Wedding!
There is great joy in NazliвҖҷs home today. Her elder cousin brother
is getting married.
Let us talk
Do you think that there will be any change in NazliвҖҷs family
after this wedding? What will change?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– Do you think there will be changes in the home from where
the new bride has come? What kind of changes?
2024-25
Looking Around
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– Talk to your mother and aunts in the family. Ask them
about where they lived before they got married.
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– Who were the members in their families then?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– Has anybody in your family been married recently? Who?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– Talk to your classmates and write all about what happens
during weddings in their families.
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– What kind of special food is cooked?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– What special clothes do the bride and bridegroom wear?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– What kinds of songs and dances are performed at weddings?
What did you see at the wedding that you attended? Draw
some pictures in your notebook. Then look at the pictures drawn
by your classmates.
We saw changes taking place in the families of Nimmi, Tsering
and Nazli because of different reasons.
Write down the reasons for these changes
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– In NimmiвҖҷs family вҖ“
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– In TseringвҖҷs family вҖ“
2024-25
Changing Families
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– In NazliвҖҷs family вҖ“
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– There can be many reasons for changes in families. Can you
think of some more reasons?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– Talk to three old people вҖ“ one from your family, one from your
friendвҖҷs family and one from a family in your neighbourhood.
Ask them these questions and fill in the table.
Question Your FriendвҖҷs NeighbourвҖҷs
family family family
l Since how many
years has your family
been staying here?
l Where did your
family live before
coming here?
l How many members
are there in your
family today?
l How many members
were there in your
family 10 years ago?
For the teacher: Changes are a part of life. However, children can be deeply
affected by changes. It is important to be sensitive about this while discussing
this topic.
2024-25
Looking Around
l What were the reasons
for the changes in
your family in the
last 10 years?
l How do you feel about
all these changes?
l What problems do you
face with changes
in technology.
My FamilyMy FamilyMy FamilyMy FamilyMy Family вҖ“ Yesterday, Today, TomorrowвҖҰвҖ“ Yesterday, Today, TomorrowвҖҰвҖ“ Yesterday, Today, TomorrowвҖҰвҖ“ Yesterday, Today, TomorrowвҖҰвҖ“ Yesterday, Today, TomorrowвҖҰ
All families change in some way or the other because of different
reasons. Has your family changed too?
When your grandmother and grandfather were children like
you, was your family just like it is today ?
Do you remember the picture of SitammaвҖҷs family tree which
we saw in Class III?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– You had also drawn a family tree of your own family. Let us
again draw the family tree of last year in your notebook.
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– Ask your grandmother or grandfather how many members
were there in their family when they were your age? Then
draw a family tree in your notebook of their family when they
were young.
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– Can you see yourself, your brother or your sister, your mother
or your father, anywhere in this family tree?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– Now draw a family tree of your present family in your
notebook.
Can you see yourself anywhere in this family tree? Who are the
members of your family today? Where are your grandparents?
2024-25
Changing Families
Let us talk
Can you tell in what ways the family tree of your grandmother
or grandfather in their childhood is different from your family
tree today?
Going Back to SchoolGoing Back to SchoolGoing Back to SchoolGoing Back to SchoolGoing Back to School
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– Upto which class do you want to study ?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– Upto which class have your parents studied?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– Till which class did your grandmother get a chance to study ?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– At what age did your grandmother get married?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– Have you heard of a Law that talks about the ages before
which girls and boys must not get married?
There are many girls who get married before they are 18
years old. Many of them have to even leave school. There are
many true stories of girls like Susheela of Ranga Reddy district
who are going back to school. She also got the help of the
Panchayat. The Panchayat said that young children should
play and study and not be married off. A group of people of
Andhra Pradesh holds special camps to help married girls to
go back to school. Jangamma and Chitti say, вҖңWe would like to
study and stand on our own feet.вҖқ
2024-25
Looking Around
Find out and writeFind out and writeFind out and writeFind out and writeFind out and write
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– Are there any such children in your neighbourhood who
had to drop out of school? Do they want to go back to school?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– What are they doing these days?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– Has anybody in your family got married recently ? Who?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– What was the age of bride and the groom?
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– What kind of dresses they wore?
Bride
Groom
Г–Г–Г–Г–Г– What kind of dishes were there? Name them.
For the teacher: Teacher can discuss about children who cannot finish
school and also the Law on Child Marriage, which has strictly fixed the
minimum age for marriage for girls at 18 and for boys at 21 years.
2024-25

learningObjectives: Understand the key concepts of Here are some pictures of families. These are the families of
Identify and explain the main ideas covered in this chapter
Apply knowledge from this chapter to real-world situations
Recall important terms and definitions from Here are some pictures of families. These are the families of
